prevalence.trend: increasing with aging, cancer, and surgery

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; risk of PE and post-thrombotic syndrome

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical pre-test probability, D-dimer when available, confirmation by venous duplex ultrasound

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; prophylaxis variable in hospitals
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; delayed diagnosis is common

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Ultrasound access mainly in urban centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Heparin/LMWH then warfarin or DOACs when affordable
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited D-dimer/ultrasound access and anticoagulation monitoring constraints
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Availability of low-cost heparin and warfarin
